title: Faux Flowers that Look Real Hydrangea Artificial Flower Decorative Purple with Stem 45 cm for Home Hotel Office Wedding Bridal Decorations Floral Arrangements 1110
features: Package included - 72 pcs small artificial plants (the vase is not included).
Material - artificial plants indoor tall made of silk cloth. Metal wire as skeleton, wrapped by plastic, can be cut or bent.

Perfect Decoration - E.g:(engagement/ wedding ceremony/ Valentine’s Day/ Anniversary/ Lover's Birthday/ Festivals etc.) or home decor:( vases/ stairs/ doors/ frames/ mirrors/ ugly pipes/ garden/ table/ swing/ arches/ cars/ bikes.) etc.

Never Wither - small artificial plants are maintenance-free, perfect for pollen allergic people. Fake flowers is uv resistant and never fade. This flowers can against fierce wind rainstorm and insolation.
Easy to maintain - The artificial flowers for outdoor may be squeezed and deformed during transportation. Please adjust the branches and flowers to the most natural state.
